raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I booked a XXXX stay at XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX through XXXX for {$6100.00}, plus {$750.00} for breakfast. The hotel was advertised as a XXXX luxury property. 

Upon arrival, we experienced serious issues : a male spa attendant was assigned to wash my wife and elderly mother while undressed without consent ; the spa pool had no lifeguard ( a XXXX law violation ) ; the hot tub was dirty with bugs ; pools were unheated in XXXX ; room phones, lamps, and doors were broken ; and service was severely understaffed throughout. 

On XX/XX/year>, I raised these concerns with hotel management. After waiting over XXXX hours, a XXXX told me " we don't really have a problem '' and refused a refund, citing a non-refundable policy. I checked out that day and relocated to the XXXX at my own expense. 

On XX/XX/year>, XXXX emailed me confirming : " The property has informed us that they have already completed the refund process for XXXX nights directly with you. '' I never received this refund. 

I filed a dispute with Citi in XX/XX/year> ( Case ID XXXX ). Citi initially ruled against me, claiming they never received supplemental documentationbut they never sent me a request for it. I then submitted all documentation including invoices, the XXXX email confirming the hotel admitted they owed me a refund, and emails to the hotel and XXXX corporate. 

Since XXXX, I have called Citi multiple times. Each time I am told " XXXX business days. '' It is now XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX XXXX  XXXX  I still have no resolution. I have submitted everything requested, the hotel admitted in writing they owe me a refund, and Citi has failed to resolve this dispute.
